productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Black Formal Shoe
description: Cast a timeless impression with this pair of square-toe franco leone loafers. Give your formal wear a twist of style with this leather shoe and revel in the comfort of easy fashion.UpperSmooth leather upper with a textured vamp for absolute comfort and styleSlip-on style for ease of useConcealed elasticated gussets on the midfoot below the tongue to offer a snug, customised FitLeather inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortLeather footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional grooves on the forefoot, midfoot and back heel for absolute grip on smooth surfacesRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
